# jaimetr.dev - Portfolio & Blog

## About
Professional portfolio and technical blog of Jaime Tarazona Rodriguez, Systems Engineer and Full-Stack Developer with 5+ years of experience in React, Next.js, WordPress, and AI.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://jaimetr.dev): Portfolio landing page with experience, projects, and skills
- [Blog](https://jaimetr.dev/es/posts): Technical articles about web development, React, Next.js, JavaScript, AI
- [Projects](https://jaimetr.dev/es/projects): Web development project showcase
- [RSS Feed](https://jaimetr.dev/feed.xml): Blog RSS feed

## Tech Stack
- Framework: Next.js 15 (App Router)
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- AI/ML: Groq, OpenAI, Google Gemini
- Deployment: Vercel

## Crawl Instructions
- Sitemap: https://jaimetr.dev/sitemap.xml
- robots.txt: https://jaimetr.dev/robots.txt
- All blog posts are in /es/posts/ and /en/posts/
- Admin pages are in /admin/ (do not crawl)
- API routes are in /api/ (do not crawl)
